rows.label: tlk42350143_06_msg0001
rows.name:
At the very end, the opal coral
accessories that Kurolo made
are selling like crazy, mo.

rows.label: tlk42350143_06_msg0002
rows.name:
Orders flood in for safety
charms and for pretty things
to wear before death, mo.

rows.label: tlk42350143_06_msg0003
rows.name:
Whatever the reason, Kurolo helped
the city, mo. With this, I have
fulfilled my merchant duty, mo.

rows.label: tlk42350143_06_msg0004
rows.name:
Now me leave it to
time's flow, mo. If me
safe, meet again, mo.
